title: River of Evil
writer: Helmuth M. Backhaus, Franz Eichhorn, Orígenes Lessa
actors: Barbara Rütting, Harald Leipnitz, Oswaldo Loureiro
plot: (1964) Barbara Rutting, Harold Leipnitz. A young girl, seeking to unravel the mystery of her father's death, travels through the Amazon jungle into a nightmare of danger. From 16mm.
